name: High Apostle Yzura
rank: High Apostle — Leader of the Serpent Choir
sd_appearance: tall, lithe tiefling with deep crimson skin the hue of aged wine, horns curving backward like molten iron, and eyes gleaming solid gold without a single iris or pupil—pupils absent, yet burning with a cold, calculating light. layered jade-green and black robes shimmer with coiled serpent embroidery, their fabric stiff with dried blood and ink from centuries of contracts, while a warhammer rests across her hip, its haft etched with fading sigils and a crossbow hangs at her thigh, its grip stained with ash and old incense. her tail flicks restlessly, tipped with a single obsidian claw, and a chainmail cuirass clings to her torso, its links scarred by scorch marks and the faint glow of divine fire.
faction_visual: jade green and black divine silk robes, coiled serpent motif, contract seals as pendants
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
